# Imajin — A Cryptographic Operating System for Sovereign Commerce

> imajin.ai runs a JBOS (Just a Bunch Of Services) on a cryptographic substrate.
> Services are commodity. Chains are permanent. Identity, attribution, trust, and settlement are structural.

## Full specification

For the complete protocol spec, architecture, and API reference:
https://imajin.ai/llms-full.txt

## What is Imajin?

Imajin (今人 — "now-person") is sovereign infrastructure. 15 independent HTTP services sharing a cryptographic kernel: signed identity chains (DFOS), .fair attribution manifests, and bilateral attestations.

The kernel (auth + pay) enforces identity and settlement. Userspace services (events, chat, market, learn, etc.) are disposable — swap, rewrite, or add more without touching the chain layer.

## Architecture

```
MJN (L6)     ← identity + attribution + trust + settlement
DFOS (L0–L5) ← proof chains, key rotation, countersignatures
HTTPS        ← transport
```

## Services (15 live)

| Service | URL | Role |
|---------|-----|------|
| auth | auth.imajin.ai | Kernel — DIDs, sessions, attestations, DFOS bridge |
| pay | pay.imajin.ai | Kernel — Stripe, settlement, .fair verification |
| connections | connections.imajin.ai | Trust — pods, invites, groups, vouches |
| profile | profile.imajin.ai | Discovery — public profiles, handles |
| registry | registry.imajin.ai | Federation — node discovery, DFOS relay |
| events | events.imajin.ai | Userspace — events, tickets, .fair splits |
| chat | chat.imajin.ai | Userspace — DID messaging, WebSocket |
| media | media.imajin.ai | Userspace — assets, .fair sidecars |
| input | input.imajin.ai | Userspace — voice (Whisper), uploads |
| learn | learn.imajin.ai | Userspace — courses, enrollment |
| market | market.imajin.ai | Userspace — local commerce |
| coffee | coffee.imajin.ai | Userspace — tipping pages |
| links | links.imajin.ai | Userspace — link-in-bio |
| dykil | dykil.imajin.ai | Userspace — spending surveys |
| www | imajin.ai | Userspace — landing, app launcher |

## Identity

Ed25519 keypairs → `did:imajin:xxx` (also valid Solana wallet). Three standing tiers: soft (email), preliminary (keypair), established (earned). Chain-backed via DFOS.

## Key Concepts

- **JBOS** — Just a Bunch Of Services. No orchestration. Services verify chains, not each other.
- **.fair** — JSON manifests: who made it, who gets paid. Kernel primitive — settlement rejects unsigned manifests.
- **Bilateral attestations** — both parties sign via DFOS countersignatures. Trust is mutual, not unilateral.
- **Exit credentials** — leave with your reputation. Signed, portable, encrypted under your key.

## Links

- Full spec: https://imajin.ai/llms-full.txt
- Source: https://github.com/ima-jin/imajin-ai
- .fair spec: https://github.com/ima-jin/.fair
- MJN protocol: https://github.com/ima-jin/mjn-protocol
- DFOS: https://protocol.dfos.com
- DFOS relay: https://registry.imajin.ai/relay/
- OpenAPI specs: https://<service>.imajin.ai/api/spec
- Developer guide: https://imajin.ai/developer-guide

## Build Stats (March 2026)

15 services · 122,721 LOC · ~120 identities · 50 days · 1 human + AI · $76K actual ($2.3M traditional estimate)

## Contact

Ryan Veteze — ryan@imajin.ai
This is exit infrastructure from platform dependency, not a competing platform.
